mapper.select:
SELECT g.id, g.student_id, g.subject_id, g.score, g.semester, s.name AS student_name, s.student_no, sub.subject_name, sub.credit FROM grade g LEFT JOIN student s ON g.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN subject sub ON g.subject_id = sub.id
ORDER BY g.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT g.id, g.student_id, g.subject_id, g.score, g.semester, s.name AS student_name, s.student_no, sub.subject_name, sub.credit FROM grade g LEFT JOIN student s ON g.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN subject sub ON g.subject_id = sub.id WHERE g.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO grade (student_id, subject_id, score, semester) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{subjectId}, #{score}, #{semester})
mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(SUM(g.score * sub.credit) / SUM(sub.credit), 2) FROM grade g JOIN subject sub ON g.subject_id = sub.id WHERE g.student_id = #{studentId}

SELECT CASE WHEN score >= 90 THEN 'A (90-100)' WHEN score >= 80 THEN 'B (80-89)' WHEN score >= 70 THEN 'C (70-79)' WHEN score >= 60 THEN 'D (60-69)' ELSE 'F (Below 60)' END AS grade_level, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM grade GROUP BY grade_level ORDER BY MIN(score) DESC

SELECT s.id, s.name, s.student_no, ROUND(SUM(g.score * sub.credit) / SUM(sub.credit), 2) AS gpa FROM grade g JOIN student s ON g.student_id = s.id JOIN subject sub ON g.subject_id = sub.id GROUP BY s.id, s.name, s.student_no ORDER BY gpa DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT sub.subject_name, ROUND(AVG(g.score), 1) AS avg_score FROM grade g JOIN subject sub ON g.subject_id = sub.id GROUP BY sub.id, sub.subject_name ORDER BY avg_score DESC
SELECT DISTINCT semester FROM grade ORDER BY semester DESC
